name: claude-code-dev-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code plugin collection for TypeScript CLI development workflows

plugins.name: cli-builder
plugins.description: TypeScript CLI project scaffolding and command template generation. Interactively generates monorepo projects (pnpm + Commander + Zod + Chalk 5.x + tsup + Vitest + @clack/prompts) with proper structure, and generates individual command templates with Commander definitions, Zod validation, and barrel exports.

skills.name: cli-create
skills.description: Interactive CLI project creation — guides users through project configuration and generates complete monorepo scaffolds with TypeScript ESM, Commander, Zod, Chalk, and full tooling (ESLint, Prettier, Husky, Changesets)

skills.name: cli-add-command
skills.description: Command template generation — creates individual command files with Commander definition, Zod validation schema, Chalk output, barrel exports, and test stubs

plugins.name: code-style
plugins.description: Enforce personal coding style conventions for AI-generated code. Strict naming (camelCase/PascalCase/kebab-case), import order, file organization, comment guidelines, and error handling rules across TypeScript, React, Vue, and SCSS projects.

skills.name: code-style-principles
skills.description: Universal coding style principles with good vs bad examples — naming conventions, file organization, comment guidelines, error handling best practices

skills.name: ts-style
skills.description: TypeScript style guide — types, import order, file structure, error handling conventions

skills.name: react-style
skills.description: React style guide — component patterns, hooks usage, error boundaries, prop typing

skills.name: vue-style
skills.description: Vue style guide — composition API, component patterns, props/emits typing, error handling

skills.name: scss-style
skills.description: SCSS style guide — naming conventions, nesting limits, variable tokens, file organization

agents.name: code-style-reviewer
agents.description: Deep code style review agent — checks naming, import order, file organization, comments, error handling, and TypeScript compliance before commits

plugins.name: marketplace-generator
plugins.description: Generate complete Claude Code plugin marketplace projects with guided workflows and example plugins. Provides marketplace-create skill for project creation and marketplace-dev-workflow skill for enforcing development standards.

skills.name: marketplace-create
skills.description: Guide users through creating a complete Claude Code plugin marketplace project from scratch — Collect, Generate, Document, Validate phases

skills.name: marketplace-dev-workflow
skills.description: Enforce development workflow standards when developing, adding, or modifying plugins in a marketplace project

skills.name: marketplace-format
skills.description: Scan, diagnose, and batch-fix format inconsistencies in existing plugin marketplace projects

agents.name: marketplace-validator
agents.description: Validate a plugin marketplace project for structural integrity, consistency, and compliance with development standards
